name: Pizzelle
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and add the sugar. Beat well and add the egg yolks and vanilla. Add the whiskey and mix.
2. Mix the flour and baking powder, then slowly add to the egg mixture.
3. Beat the egg whites until stiff. Gently fold into the flour mixture. The dough should not be sticky; add enough flour so that the batter will drop from a floured spoon (no more than 1 cup of flour).
4. Refrigerate the dough overnight to make it easier to handle.
5. Use a pizzelle iron to make these cookies. Makes 16 dozen cookies.
